scripts.check: bun run check:quick:all && bun run check:bundle
scripts.check:pure-ts-tests: bun scripts/run-compact-command.ts --label pure-ts-tests -- bun test --reporter=dot tests/pure-ts
scripts.check:color-gpu-readback-runtime-smoke: RAWENGINE_RUN_GPU_READBACK_PROBE=1 RAWENGINE_GPU_READBACK_PROOF_PATH=../docs/validation/color-gpu-readback-runtime-smoke-2026-06-20.json bun scripts/run-compact-command.ts --label color-gpu-readback-runtime-smoke --cwd src-tauri -- cargo test --quiet --locked --no-default-features --features required-ci,validation-harness,tauri-test color_gpu_readback_probe::tests::runtime_smoke_reads_back_gpu_texture_when_enabled
scripts.check:denoise-preview-runtime: bun scripts/run-compact-command.ts --label denoise-preview-runtime --cwd src-tauri -- cargo test --quiet denoise_render --no-default-features --features required-ci
scripts.check:denoise-separation-runtime: bun scripts/run-compact-command.ts --label denoise-separation-runtime --cwd src-tauri -- cargo test --quiet luma_and_chroma_noise_controls_have_independent_output_effects --no-default-features --features required-ci
scripts.check:raw-open-edit-export-validation-fe: bun scripts/run-compact-command.ts --label raw-open-edit-export-validation-feature --cwd src-tauri -- cargo check --locked --no-default-features --features required-ci,validation-harness
scripts.check:computational-private-root-prep: bun scripts/run-compact-checks.ts --label computational-private-root-prep check:hdr-real-raw-private-root-prep check:focus-real-raw-private-root-prep check:sr-real-raw-private-root-prep check:panorama-real-raw-private-root-prep
scripts.prepare:computational-private-root: bun scripts/run-compact-checks.ts --label computational-private-root prepare:hdr-real-raw-private-root prepare:focus-real-raw-private-root prepare:sr-real-raw-private-root prepare:panorama-real-raw-private-root
scripts.check:computational-private-root-assets: bun scripts/run-compact-checks.ts --label computational-private-root-assets check:hdr-real-raw-private-root-assets check:focus-real-raw-private-root-assets check:sr-real-raw-private-root-assets check:panorama-real-raw-private-root-assets
scripts.check:computational-private-proof-runner: bun scripts/run-compact-checks.ts --label computational-private-proof-runners check:hdr-real-raw-private-proof check:panorama-real-raw-private-proof check:focus-real-raw-private-proof check:sr-real-raw-private-proof
scripts.check:negative-lab-public-export-review-: bun run check:negative-lab-public-export-proof && bun scripts/capture-visual-smoke.ts --scenario negative-lab-public-export-review
scripts.check:negative-lab-real-raw-private-revi: bun run check:negative-lab-real-raw-private-proof && bun scripts/capture-visual-smoke.ts --scenario negative-lab-real-raw-private-review
scripts.check:actions: bun run check:actions:lint && bun run check:workflow-policy && bun run check:workflow-policy:self-test && bun run check:compact-commands && bun run check:compact-commands:self-test && bun run check:rust-feature-policy && bun run check:rust-feature-policy:self-test && bun run schema:contract-gate:self-test
scripts.check:security: bun run check:security:js && bun run check:security:rust
scripts.check:security:js: bun scripts/run-compact-command.ts --label security:js -- bun audit --audit-level moderate
scripts.check:security:rust: bun run check:rust-advisory-waivers && bun scripts/run-compact-command.ts --label security:rust --cwd src-tauri -- cargo audit --ignore RUSTSEC-2024-0429
scripts.check:licenses: bun run check:licenses:js && bun run check:licenses:rust
scripts.check:licenses:rust: bun scripts/run-compact-command.ts --label licenses:rust --cwd src-tauri -- cargo deny check licenses
scripts.unused:report: bun scripts/run-compact-command.ts --label unused:report -- knip --config knip.jsonc --reporter compact --max-show-issues 25 --no-exit-code
scripts.check:unused-deps: bun scripts/run-compact-command.ts --label unused-deps -- knip --config knip.jsonc --dependencies --reporter compact
scripts.check:bundle: bun run check:bundle:policy && bun run check:vite-minification && bun run check:release-frontend-contract && bun run check:bundle:report:self-test && bun run check:bundle:summary:self-test && bun run check:production-payload:self-test && bun run check:bundle:budget:self-test && bun run build:frontend && bun run check:production-payload && bun run check:bundle:budget && bun run check:bundle:report
scripts.check:rust: bun run check:rust:fmt && bun run check:rust:check && bun run check:rust:clippy && bun run check:rust:test
scripts.check:rust:fmt: bun scripts/run-compact-command.ts --label rust:fmt --cwd src-tauri -- cargo fmt -p RapidRAW -- --check
scripts.check:rust:check: bun scripts/run-compact-command.ts --label rust:check --cwd src-tauri -- cargo check --locked --no-default-features --features required-ci
scripts.check:rust:clippy: bun scripts/run-compact-command.ts --label rust:clippy --cwd src-tauri -- cargo clippy --locked --all-targets --no-default-features --features required-ci -- -D warnings -W clippy::redundant_clone
scripts.schema:check: bun scripts/run-compact-checks.ts --label schema:check schema:types schema:fixtures schema:samples schema:migrations check:schema-production-boundary
scripts.schema:types: bun scripts/run-compact-command.ts --label schema:types -- tsc -p packages/rawengine-schema/tsconfig.json --noEmit --pretty false
scripts.check:rust:test: bun scripts/run-compact-command.ts --label rust:test --cwd src-tauri -- cargo test --quiet --locked --all-targets --no-default-features --features required-ci --no-fail-fast
scripts.docs:check: bun scripts/run-compact-checks.ts --label docs:check docs:format docs:links check:bundle:policy
